title: passiflora candida
intro: Passiflora candida, also known as white passionflower, is a type of flowering vine native to Australia, characterized by its white or pale purple flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its sedative and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Passiflora candida include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from menopausal symptoms and insomnia. Passiflora candida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in herbal infusions and topical creams to harness its therapeutic benefits.
